/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,DestroyOutsideBehavior.xgde -o /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/CppPlatform/Extensions/DestroyOutsideBehavior.xgde CMakeFiles/DestroyOutsideBehavior.dir/DestroyOutsideBehavior.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DestroyOutsideBehavior.dir/Extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DestroyOutsideBehavior.dir/JsExtension.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/libGDCore.so
